description*.en: The "Neutron Yield per Absorption" is the average number of fission neutrons, both prompt and delayed, emitted per neutron absorbed in a fissionable nuclide or in a nuclear fuel, as specified.

title: NeutronYieldPerAbsorption
description: The "Neutron Yield per Absorption" is the average number of fission neutrons, both prompt and delayed, emitted per neutron absorbed in a fissionable nuclide or in a nuclear fuel, as specified.
